pullRequest.title: Migrate from Poetry to uv
pullRequest.body:
Migrate from Poetry to uv 


https://github.blog/changelog/2025-12-16-dependabot-security-updates-now-support-uv/                                                 
                                                                                        
  Closes #2755.                                                                         
                                                                                        
  The last blocker — Dependabot support for `uv.lock` — has been resolved. This PR        
  completes the migration.                                                              
                                                                                        
  What changed                                                                          
                                                                                        
  - `pyproject.toml` (root + template): removed poetry-core build backend, converted      
  dependencies to PEP 621 [project] format and dev/docs groups to PEP 735               
  [dependency-groups]                                                                   
  - Lockfiles: replaced both poetry.lock files with `uv.lock`
  - Dockerfile: replaced Poetry curl installer with `COPY --from=ghcr.io/astral-sh/uv:0.7`
   (deterministic, no network install)                                                  
  - GitHub Actions: replaced curl poetry install with `astral-sh/setup-uv@v5`; `poetry run 
  → uv run`; `poetry check → uv lock --check`                                              
  - GitLab CI: same pattern with curl uv installer      
  - Dependabot: package-ecosystem: pip → package-ecosystem: uv                          
  - All docs: updated commands, references to `poetry.lock` → `uv.lock`, added "Goodbye,    
  poetry!" migration guide

pullRequest.title: Changing direct urls to reverse function
feat: Add django-cors-header support
pullRequest.body:
## Description 
Added the django-cors-headers to enable Cross-Origin Resource Sharing (CORS).

## Changes
- Added **"django-cors-headers"** to the project dependencies
- Added corsheaders to the **INSTALLED_APPS**
- Added **CorsMiddleware** to the MIDDLEWARE
- Configured **CORS_ALLOWED_ORGINS** and **CORS_ALLOW_CREDENTIALS**

Closes #2968
